theorem iIndepFun_rewardByCount [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P):
    iIndepFun (fun p : α × ℕ ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1)) 𝔓' := by
  apply iIndepFun.mono (iIndepFun_map_2 (iIndepFun_fst_snd _ _) (ε := _))
  <;> simp_all [Function.pi_apply]
  <;>
  try aesop
  <;>
  try
    exact iIndepFun.comp (h.iIndepFun_reward_by_count) _ _
  <;>
  try
    exact h.iIndepFun_reward_by_count
  <;>
  try
    aesop

lemma identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) :
    IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
      (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
  refine IdentDistrib.pi (fun p ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_
  · refine identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h p.1 (p.2 + 1) p.2 (by simp) (ν := ν)
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  · intro p q
    simp [Function.funext_iff]
    <;> aesop

theorem identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) :
    IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
      (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
  refine IdentDistrib.pi (fun p ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_
  · refine identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h p.1 (p.2 + 1) p.2 (by simp) (ν := ν)
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  · simp_all [iIndepFun_Iio]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [iIndepFun.codigo])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [iIndepFun.praio])
    <;>
    try simp_all [iIndepFunCodigo]
    <;>
    try simp_all [iIndepFun_praio]

lemma iIndepFun_rewardByCount [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) :
    iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1)) 𝔓' := by
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  rw [iIndepFun_nat_iff_forall_indepFun (by fun_prop)]
  exact indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic h _ (by simp)

lemma identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream_all [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) :
    IdentDistrib (fun ω (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)
      (fun ω p ↦ ω p.2 p.1) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
  refine IdentDistrib.pi (fun p ↦ ?_) ?_ ?_
  · refine identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h p.1 (p.2 + 1) p.2 (by simp) (ν := ν)
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount h
  · have h₁ : ∀ (p : α × ℕ), Measurable measurableCountable (fun ω => ω p.2 p.1) := by
      intro p
      apply measurable_infinitePi_val
    have h₂ : ∀ (p : α × ℕ), Measurable measurableCountable (fun ω => rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω) := by
      intro p
      have h₃ : Measurable measurableCountable (fun ω => (rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω)) := by
        have h₄ : Measurable measurableCountable (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) => rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1) ω) := by
          have h₅ := h.measurable_A
          have h₆ := h.measurable_R
          have h₇ : Measurable (measurableCountable.comap (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) => ω.2 (p.2 + 1) p.1)) (fun ω => ω) := by
            apply measurable_comap.measurability
            <;> simp_all [measurable_infinitePi_val]
            <;> try (simp_all [measurable_infinitePi_val])
            <;> try (simp_all [measurable_infinitePi_val])
          have h₈ : (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) => ω.2 (p.2 + 1) p.1) = (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) => ω.2 (p.2 + 1) p.1) := rfl
          have h₉ : Measurable (measurableCountable.comap (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) => ω.2 (p.2 + 1) p.1)) (fun ω => ω) := by
            apply measurable_comap.measurability
            <;> simp_all [measurable_infinitePi_val]
            <;> try (simp_all [measurable_infinitePi_val])
            <;> try (simp_all [measurable_infinitePi_val])
          simp_all [phiInfinite]
        exact h₄
      exact h₃
    simp_all [IdentDistrib, iIndepFun, IsMarkovKernel, ProbabilityTheory.indetFun_iff]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [measurableCountable])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
